name: construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month, manual conversion causes delays in project timelines. We automate document conversion instead of manual document conversion.
problem_solved: Manual conversion of project plans to permit applications is time-consuming and error-prone.
features: basic template selection for permit applications
